name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #11
description: Florentine Brainrot #11 is a toxic emerald tabloid single-panel relic built around Botticelli and Windows 95 Treasury Panic. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Asso di Denari, used here as the witness card. Botticelli left a receipt where the Burn Address Pilgrimage should have been. The groupchat says no cap and immediately screenshots the evidence. Serial BOTT-11 carries codon marker GATTAAACTACCATATGTGAACTCCTAATT; Gematria marks SIGMA at Σ 294.

attributes.value: a cartoon oracle vending machine dispensing bad alpha
